title: BetterSpawnProtect
description: BetterSpawnProtect is a plugin that allows you to block your server's players from performing certain actions within a radius
body:
# Description
BetterSpawnProtect is a plugin that allows you to block your server's players from performing certain actions within a radius

## abilitys

- Prohibit placing blocks
- Prohibit break blocks
- Prohibit placing fire
- Prohibit activate a explosion

###   Plugin have a very configurable config
